examples: She swept the crumbs into the wastebasket.
Having thrown the rankings in the wastebasket, what should you do?
You would throw the magazine in the wastebasket.
That's when I saw the glossy pregnancy test box sticking out of the old copper wastebasket.
He was ugly, a nondescript wastebasket-on-wheels that would have fit right in at a dingy rental-car agency.
